allow:
Bash(CONFIG=~/dotfiles/.devcontainer/devcontainer.json && devcontainer exec --workspace-folder ~/dotfiles --config $CONFIG bash -c '
echo "=== CLI tools ==="
for cmd in git gh node npm npx bun rg fd bat eza fzf jq delta curl wget tree watch tmux; do
  printf "%-10s %s\\n" "$cmd" "$\(command -v $cmd && echo OK || echo MISSING\)"
done

echo ""
echo "=== Language runtimes ==="
for cmd in go rustc cargo python3 uv uvx; do
  printf "%-10s %s\\n" "$cmd" "$\(command -v $cmd && echo OK || echo MISSING\)"
done

echo ""
echo "=== Claude Code ==="
claude --version 2>/dev/null || echo "claude MISSING"

echo ""
echo "=== Claude config injection ==="
for f in ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md ~/.claude/rules/markdown.md ~/.claude/.mcp.json ~/.claude/keybindings.json ~/.claude/settings.json ~/.claude/hooks/tmux-window-claude-status.sh ~/.claude/hooks/cleanup-short-sessions.sh ~/.claude/hooks/session_summarizer.py ~/.claude/statusline-command.sh; do
  printf "%-55s %s\\n" "$f" "$\([ -f "$f" ] && echo OK || echo MISSING\)"
done

echo ""
echo "=== MCP server commands ==="
printf "%-10s %s\\n" "npx" "$\(npx --version 2>/dev/null && echo OK || echo MISSING\)"
printf "%-10s %s\\n" "uvx" "$\(uvx --version 2>/dev/null && echo OK || echo MISSING\)"

echo ""
echo "=== settings.json content ==="
jq -r "keys[]" ~/.claude/settings.json 2>/dev/null || echo "PARSE ERROR"

echo ""
echo "=== .mcp.json servers ==="
jq -r ".mcpServers | keys[]" ~/.claude/.mcp.json 2>/dev/null || echo "PARSE ERROR"
' 2>&1)

Bash(CONFIG=~/dotfiles/.devcontainer/devcontainer.json && devcontainer exec --workspace-folder ~/dotfiles --config $CONFIG bash -c 'echo "=== claude location ===" && find / -name claude -type f 2>/dev/null | head -5 && echo "=== PATH ===" && echo $PATH && echo "=== HOST_DIR symlinks ===" && ls -la ~/.claude-host/CLAUDE.md ~/.claude-host/hooks ~/.claude-host/rules ~/.claude-host/statusline-command.sh ~/.claude-host/keybindings.json 2>&1 && echo "=== workspace .claude ===" && ls -la /workspace/.claude/ 2>&1' 2>&1)

Bash(CONFIG=~/dotfiles/.devcontainer/devcontainer.json && devcontainer exec --workspace-folder ~/dotfiles --config $CONFIG bash -c 'sudo find /root -name claude 2>/dev/null && sudo ls -la /root/.local/bin/ 2>/dev/null | head -10' 2>&1)

Bash(CONFIG=~/dotfiles/.devcontainer/devcontainer.json && devcontainer exec --workspace-folder ~/dotfiles --config $CONFIG bash -c 'ls -la /usr/local/bin/claude 2>&1; ls -la /root/.local/bin/claude 2>&1 || true; which claude 2>&1 || true; echo "--- image check ---"; docker inspect --format="{{.Image}}" $\(hostname\) 2>/dev/null || true' 2>&1)

Bash(CONFIG=~/dotfiles/.devcontainer/devcontainer.json && devcontainer exec --workspace-folder ~/dotfiles --config $CONFIG bash -c '
echo "=== Firewall ==="
if curl --connect-timeout 3 -s https://example.com >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  echo "example.com: REACHABLE \(firewall not active or permissive mode\)"
else
  echo "example.com: BLOCKED \(OK\)"
fi
if curl --connect-timeout 3 -s https://api.github.com/zen >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  echo "api.github.com: REACHABLE \(OK\)"
else
  echo "api.github.com: BLOCKED \(ERROR\)"
fi
if curl --connect-timeout 3 -s https://api.anthropic.com >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  echo "api.anthropic.com: REACHABLE \(OK\)"
else
  echo "api.anthropic.com: BLOCKED \(ERROR\)"
fi
' 2>&1)
